summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlining the company's vigilance processes for handling serious safety events and field safety corrective actions (FSCA). It details reporting requirements to competent authorities under EU Medical Device Regulation (MDR) 2017/745, including timelines and criteria for defining serious incidents. The SOP also defines procedures for Field Safety Notices (FSN) and communication with users regarding device risks or modifications.
